ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the market was launched */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the market's website */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the market */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the asset is traded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., coin, token) */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain used by the asset */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading interval (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour) */,
  "interval_length" INTEGER /* Length of the trading interval in seconds */,
  "interval_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading interval (e.g., time-based, tick-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading interval */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Open time of the trade */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the trade */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the trade */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the trade */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the trade */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Close time of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., limit, market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES trading_intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quote_assets" (
  "quote_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote asset */,
  "quote_asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the quote asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quote asset */,
  "fiat_currency" TEXT /* Fiat currency associated with the quote asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quote_asset_volumes" (
  "quote_asset_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote asset volume */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "quote_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote asset */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the quote asset */,
  "volume_value" REAL /* Value of the volume in the quote asset's fiat currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_asset_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quote_asset_volumes_quote_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_asset_id") REFERENCES quote_assets ("quote_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quote_asset_volumes_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taker_buy_base_asset_volumes" (
  "taker_buy_base_asset_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taker buy base asset volume */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the taker buy base asset */,
  "volume_value" REAL /* Value of the volume in the base asset's fiat currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taker_buy_base_asset_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taker_buy_base_asset_volumes_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taker_buy_quote_asset_volumes" (
  "taker_buy_quote_asset_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taker buy quote asset volume */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the taker buy quote asset */,
  "volume_value" REAL /* Value of the volume in the quote asset's fiat currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taker_buy_quote_asset_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taker_buy_quote_asset_volumes_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trading data */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trading data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ignore_flags" (
  "ignore_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ignore flag */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "ignore" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether to ignore the trade (0 or 1) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for ignoring the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ignore_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ignore_flags_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market being analyzed */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading interval */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the analysis period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the analysis period */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., moving average, relative strength index) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES trading_intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
